title: What To Do For a Dog With Separation Anxiety
raw_text: Separation anxiety protocol: Step 1 Pre-departure cue desensitization - add only one cue per day, wait 2 days between cues. Step 2 Graduated departures starting 1-2 seconds, stay calm during exit and return. Step 3 Counterconditioning with stuffed food toy at 5-10 second separations as safety cue. Step 4 Wait several minutes between absences ensuring dog is fully relaxed. Step 5 Limit stress triggers with baby gates, soothing sounds, cozy spaces. Step 6 Coordinate with all household members on leaving protocol.

metadata.notes: Professional dog training site with structured step-by-step protocol
